headline: AI demand fuels investor portfolios, oil posts biggest monthly decline
detail: This is the direct catalyst for your book today. AI demand narrative lifts semis and mega-cap tech, which is essentially everything you own. Oil dropping hard keeps input costs low and keeps rotation into tech alive.
rec: If SOXL and SMH hold current levels into the close, today's tape validates the AI bid. ALAB scanner setup (entry 481.96-482.54, stop 479.73, score 9/12) is the cleanest play if you want new exposure - but only on a clean pull into that entry, not chasing.

headline: Anthropic: Trump admin lifts export controls on Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5
detail: Eased AI export controls mean broader global deployment of frontier models, which directly drives more GPU and chip demand. This is a near-term positive for NVDA, CRWD, and the broader semi complex you hold via SMH and SOXL.
rec: No new buy yet - NVDA scanner is only grade C (entry 198.39-198.62, stop 197.35) and the 4H is down. Watch CRWD (+6.07%) for continuation; stop is far at $590 so you have room, but don't add size here without a clean base.

headline: Japan spent $74B propping up yen; real battle is with the Fed
detail: This is the macro risk hiding under the AI rally. If the Fed stays hawkish longer, yen intervention fails, dollar spikes, and risk assets including your leveraged ETFs get hit hard and fast. Leveraged names like SOXL and SPAL are most exposed to a sudden rate-shock selloff.
rec: No action today, but this is exactly why your stops on SOXL ($200) and SPAL ($21.38) are non-negotiable - a Fed-surprise reversal would hit leveraged positions before you can react.

headline: Iran selling oil at 20% premium as 40M barrels hit market after blockade ends
detail: More oil supply hitting the market reinforces the oil price decline trend, keeping energy costs down and supporting the ongoing rotation into tech and AI names. Indirectly positive for your holdings but not a direct catalyst.
rec: This reinforces the current tailwind but doesn't give you a specific entry point in anything you hold or the scanner setups above - sit tight and let the existing positions work.
